t.t: Apply to become an authorized dealer

option.t-att-selected: str(fval or '') == str(st.id) and 'selected' or None

div.small: Your application is under review. No further edits are allowed.
Fill out all four sections of the form
Save draft anytime, submit when ready

t.div: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.

div.div: Application submitted — your application is currently under review. Fields are read-only. Contact us if you need to make changes.

div.p: Legal name, trade name and contact details
Leave blank if same as business address
Legal structure, tax status and federal identifiers

div.label: Has any principle been involved in bankruptcy?

div.p: Optional — leave blank if not applicable

div.div: By submitting this application, I certify that all information provided is accurate and complete. I authorize Sunair to verify the information and contact the references listed above.

t.t: Type your full name as signature

div.small: Our team will review your application within 2–3 business days.

div.p: Thank you for applying to become an authorized Sunair dealer.
Your application is now under review
Our accounts receivable team will review your submitted application within 2–3 business days.
After finance review, your application will proceed to a manager for final approval.
Once approved, you will receive your dealer starter kit and account setup instructions.
